pages.title: New-Active-Monitoring Termux Resource
pages.content:
1) Improvements:

1) make a pop-up or picture-in-picture feature available , where System Overview can be see in short manner, add a symbol in header near theme change button so i can pop it out.
2) Add a counter for cron tab
                 - in System Overview show a time for next cron job appearing time.
                 - In the monitoring section add a section to see all cron job list , basically cronjob file
3) Add a time tunner for individual resources monitoring section, to tune there rescan time, like if i want to adjust the time of space monitoring rescan time then i will change the time tunnining facility digits in that resource monitoring section, it should be seconds

4) all the configuration of this resource monitoring should be work and manage by a config file which stored in same location as python script.
if i want to mannually update the change like add a path to monitor , or port to monitor , or tune there scan time , or increase the process monitoring list then i will use the config file that will help to make the live changes . and this resource monitoring will point to the config file to update the change in portal. this config file is for more robust way to maintain the portal , instead of depending on local storage of browser to save all config, we now on use config file , config file name as resource_monitoring_config_file.conf or which ever you choose.

5) Here for uptime do one thing , use command "uptime in the termux which will generate the output use that to show uptime, to sync properly, and control the timing or rescan use the parameter of rescan time from config file here to rescan the uptime. default is 3 min. can be change able.
like:
uptime
 07:11:17 up 2 days, 13:35,  load average: 22.07, 22.32, 23.30
use this uptime as it is with details, and uptime -> 07:11:17 up, 2days.

6) for cpu load : here what we can do count most cpu consuming process data and collection of process to represent cpu usage
here what we can do, in System Overview show the percentage of high cpu utiliing process / total process cpu usage, like, 
python 174% / All process 120% , 
or if you have better option then this use that

subPages.title: Sub Page 1
subPages.content:
here need some change ,

1) i want to self-define resource_monitoring_config.conf file path,
In code make a change that the location which i will mentioned in code will be the storing location of resource_monitoring_config.conf and from that location the configuration will get manage and control and update.

2) in  Network Speed component now Device Ip should be Highlighted 
in network speed tab need a tab that will show all info of network
like


Also need one more UI change
3) Top Processes component now have a input box (same as other component so i can change the count to monitor) that will able to change the count of process to get monitor, 

4) in Cron tab component now cron history should be maintain last 15 executed cron (this count should be changeable via digit setter in the component like other component) now get historized and in that component a tab should be there where i can see the history of executed cron , make this in such a way 
date time Cron-name status
12-july-2026 12:45 PM list-all succsessfull 
12-july-2026 12:50 PM list-no failed

or if you have better idea then utilize the presentation accordingly, 
Make sure you add a 2nd tab in single component of cron to see the history

subPages.title: vkey-phase-1-&-2-develop-till-now
subPages.content:
test case for portal:

A) Login panel
1) sing in - pass (able to login)
2) 5 wrong password - initialize wait time of 5 min - pass (working correctly , if wrongly attempt to login with password till 5 time - portal got lock , and to login again wait for 5 min) - pass
3) theme change - light to dark, dark to light - pass
4) try to login without entering password - ( should show please fill in this field) - pass 
5) try to login without entering username - ( should show please fill in this field) - pass 
6) try to login without entering username & password- ( should show please fill in this field) - pass 

B) Post login - main page

1) Theme changer - works correctly to switch the theme - pass
2) Logout - work correctly to logout form the portal - pass

3) overview section - 
3.1) the symbol used here are look to chatgpt generated - Need improvement (use csv symbols and make them offline , so no internet interaction) - failed

4) menu - 
 4.1) Add entry - 
   4.1.1) on click Add entry - able to open Add New Entry page ; - (improvement - Make use of entire screen for this page ) 
   4.1.1.0) On Add New Entry page: default category - General, & subcategory - General, initially key Name & Value is blank and available for user to enter data - pass , also no item can be kept blank - if try to save show relevent error - pass
   4.1.1.1) On Add New Entry page: on click Back to Dashboard - able to back to main page; - pass
   4.1.1.2) On Add New Entry page: on click cancel back to main page - work correctly;  - pass

   4.1.1.3) Without entering Key try to save - should show "please fill out this field" - correctly working - pass
   4.1.1.4) Without entering value try to save - should show "please fill out this field" - correctly working - pass
   4.1.1.5) Without entering category try to save - should not save - display worning - category cannot be empty - working correctly - pass
   4.1.1.6) Without entering subcategory try to save - should not save - display worning - category cannot be empty - working correctly - pass
   4.1.1.7) no entry can kept unenter - if so and try to save - should show relevent error - working as expected - pass

 4.2) Export csv - work correctly - able to export data into csv - pass
 4.3) Import csv - work correctly - Able to import the csv data - pass
 4.4) Full Report - work correctly showing all the record and statis (able to open the settings (will consider setting in detail below ) currently just checked able to open the full report page)- pass
 4.5) settings - able to open the settings (will consider setting in detail below ) - pass
 4.6) table resize lock - table lock not working - 
      4.6.1) if lock - colour of it change to - red - so table resize activity lock - it will stop user to change the column size from header of table - failed - its changing colour but resize not working
     4.6.2) if unlock - colour of it change to green - so user should be able to resize the column from header of table - failed - unable to resize the column

5) filter section
5.1) category -  Able to filter content in table - pass
5.2) subcategory - able to filter content in table - pass
5.3) category & subcategory filter at same time - able to filter table - pass

6) Table
6.1) header click and sort - working , able to click and sort the content - pass
6.2) entries getting increase as add-entry execute , new entry visible in table - pass
6.3) view - button - on - value visible, off - value hides in stars - working as expected - pass
6.4) Hide - button - on - hide all data of the entry , off - show data of entry by considering toggle status of view button - working as expected - pass
6.5) Action button 
 6.5.1) edit - click able to open edit mode -> shows previous available data of entry -> pass
  6.5.1.1) click save entry ->  save the data if updated , say data as previous if not updated, - pass
  6.5.1.2) click cancle -> exit edit mode - discard the changes  , keep previous data as it is - pass
 6.5.2) delete button - on click  -> show warning - with button [cancle,ok] -> cancle -> discard the delete operation, ok -> delete the entry from table - pass

7) Full Report - 
7.1) on click of full report button on main menu - able to open Full Report page - pass
7.2) Full Report Page should use entire screen - failed
7.3) auto backup default - should show the default day count - on every 30 day auto backup done - pass
7.4) Hide entries - no of entries hide in table should show count of it - correctly working - pass
7.5) Last Auto Backup date - Should show last auto backup done date yyyy-mm-dd format - working correctly - pass
7.6) Month delete - should track & show the entries that deleted in current month - count of entry delete should track month wise and include current date entry delete as well - failed - only showing monthly  - check here what to do
7.7) month new - should increment as add entry saved succefully - working correctly - pass
7.8) total categories - track total count of category - pass
7.9) total entries - should track total count of entries - pass
7.10) total subcategories - should track total count of subcategory - pass
7.11) unchange default - should show unchange default - pass
7.12) week delete - should track the count of deleted entry in current week - consider today and day in week - failded - check how it is working 
7.13) week new - should track the count of new entry in current week - working correctly - pass

8) Settings -
8.1) on click on settings button in main page -> should open settings page - able to open the settings page -> pass
8.2) setting page should use entire screen --> should use entire screen on desktop - failed 
8.3) Access & Security -> 
8.3.1) Enable login (default on) -> please find the test of loggin on/off below

{
as started the server config file created: with table status: , so initially lock is - off

phase 3:



3. New Features (Make it Feature‑Ful)
Search & Advanced Filtering
Pagination
Bulk Actions
Audit Log
Version History (per entry)
Backup & Restore Improvements
Tagging
Dashboard Stats
Encyp - done
Multi user
hover - data if cursor on it
stay with column filter, 

this phase 3 features look like admin work
so need a admin page where we can check this all or enable it, or this can be done from settings page only so check what best suite here

Global Search & Advanced Filtering - [Needed - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature
if on - then search is available
if off - then the search is not avaiable in portal]
Description - search and filter in table in real time (client side) by key , val, cat ,subcat, multi select filter for category and subcate

Pagination - [implement it - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature
if on - then search is available
if off - then the search is not avaiable in portal]
Instead of loading all entries at once, paginate them (10, 25, 50 per page) – reduces DOM size and improves performance.

Bulk Actions - [Needed - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature
if on - then bulk action is available
if off - then the bulk action is not avaiable in portal]
description - Add checkboxes to select multiple entries, then delete, hide, or export them in one go.
for hide/export its ok 
for deletion of multi entry need a strong security check , implement a accidental protection with password, even if password granted and perform the action need to backup the data then delete it.
and even if data is granted to delete then that entry will move to recycle bin with time stamp, so if user want to restore it he can restore from recycle bin , this can useful in single or bulk action

Audit log - [ Must Needed - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature
if on - then Audit log is available
if off - then the Audit log is not avaiable in portal]
Description - Create a separate table audit_log that records who (if multi‑user) and when an entry was created, updated, or deleted.
Even without multi‑user, this helps track changes over time.

Version History (per entry) - [ Must Needed - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature
if on - then version history is available
if off - then the version history is not avaiable in portal]
description - Store old versions of an entry (key, value, category, subcategory) each time it’s modified.
Then you can rollback to a previous state.
can maintain a history of 20 version and (this count can be changeable vai settings)

Backup & Restore Improvements - [ Must Needed - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature
if on - then backup & restore is available
if off - then the backup & restore is not avaiable in portal]
Description  Currently you have a backup interval, but you could: Add a “Backup Now” button that creates a timestamped JSON/CSV backup in the configured path.    Show a list of available backups and allow restore from them.
the backup path / restore path can be configurable/changeable
the backup can be done in two location at the same time
so we can add two path here for backup in settings

Dry-backup/restore -before backup/restore we can check what include in the backup/restore so it won't disturb the main data

multi user - it can be multi user - [ can be implemented - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature
if on - then multi user is available
if off - then the multi user is not avaiable in portal]
flow of multi user 
from scratch - > run the script -> config created -> login -> 1st user ( admin) check all -> go to setting/admin-page -> if required add a user in user entrie , give him required above feature (can be turn on/off from admin) -> once admin create it, -> user can use the creadential given by admin 
1) so initially user create from admin page
2) user create from requrest from login page to create new user -
2.1) flow - user can create username / passwd - > this request goes to admin portal -> once admin approve it user can login -then in user portal -request features
2.2) flow - user can create username / passwd , also select features (if admin has setteted such setting for user creation and allow him to select feature in create user page only then only able to see and select features)- > this request goes to admin portal -> once admin approve it user can login -then in user portal -request features
so this need to create creatively carefully 

hover the text of table if cursor on it, but if the hover for key, value then this should be first check status of hide/view button , if they are mean to be off or hide the data then don't hover

this all look like a admin features , so a admin page is needed here. create a admin page, and make the visibility of admin page crontrol from settings page, 
admin panel - off in settings - so it wont appeares in main page,
admin panel - on in settings - so it can appeares in main page.

ok, do one this we will work on it feature by feature in phase so we can test and improve then move ahead 

list all the features first that are now suggested , check want can be do with minimum changes,

Pagination - [implement it - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature

Bulk Actions - [Needed - can be turn on/off from settings to make use of this feature
